title: Ubiquiti LTU-Pro, 5GHz LTU, CPE
description: LTU-Pro is a PtMP CPE unit for the 5GHz band with 24dBi antenna gain and proprietary LTU wireless technology that is not based on the 802.11 standard protocol can deliver real TCP/IP speeds 600Mbps+ (up to 1Gbps+ with future fw) , modulation up to 1025 QAM (up to 4096 QAM with future fw) and higher spectral efficiency 21.2 bps/Hz , twice the 802.11AC standard! PtMP CPE 1024 QAM (in future fw up to 4096 QAM) 10/20/30/40/50 MHz channel bandwidth (in future fw up to 100MHz!) Central configuration management from AP side Frequency split Auto power adjustments Router and bridge mode support LTU technology allows you to set different transmission (Tx) and receive (Rx) frequencies to avoid interference, increasing your network's throughput LTU is a completely new platform based on proprietary technology, which doesn't use 802.11 protocol, making it incompatible with 802.11n and 802.11ac devices. For that reason it is NOT compatible with airMAX M5 nor with airMAX 5AC On the other hand, although LTU is based on airFiber technology, it uses a different protocol for communication, making it incompatible with other 5GHz airFiber products such as AF-5X or AF-5/5U In addition to its own web management, LTU products are also supported by UNMS software for central management and management of Ubiquiti devices Device Holder Gigabit PoE power adapter 24V/0.5A Power cord
specsSearch: Wireless features F/B ratio [dB] 27 Maximum modulation 1024 QAM Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards LTU Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 22 Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 14 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 14 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 2 Antenna gain [dBi] 24 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 22 .. 26V DC PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 9 Physical characteristics Purpose Outdoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Weight [g] 1300 Width [mm] 317 Height [mm] 317 Depth [mm] 174
